pages.title: Chancellor
pages.text: Elected office. Caps at one holder. The Chancellor names the Treasurer and the Judge.$(br2)Election is social — there is no in-game ballot. Vote, dialog, whatever the server agrees on. An admin sets the office once decided.

pages.title: Regalia (6 recipes)
pages.text: $(bold)Hero Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots.$(/)$(br2)$(bold)Hero Claymore.$(/)$(br2)$(bold)Crown.$(/) The Crown has no other source in CabaCraft — no trader sells it, no other recipe exists.

pages.title: Banner
pages.text: The Chancellor flies the $(bold)King's Crest Flag$(/), crafted by $(l:secondaries/decorator)Decorator$(/l). Use it as your seat-of-government decoration.
